meta.title: Making a Killing | Ep. 13 Olympics Special, Travis Tygart on Corruption and Doping in Sports
meta.description:
With the 2020 Olympic Games just hours away, Paul Massaro catches up with Travis Tygart, Chief Executive of the US Antidoping Agency, to discuss the growing problem of corruption in international sports.

Subscribe: 

Apple podcasts: https://podcasts.apple.com/us/podcast/making-a-killing/id1551344782
Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/show/0LksXZHMcTGwMk1eV1BsLu
